title: digitaria pedicellaris
intro: Digitaria pedicellaris, also known as Finger Grass or Digitaria, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in African medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The medicinal properties of Digitaria pedicellaris include its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, fighting fever, and alleviating symptoms of digestive disorders, and it is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use.
